node_types.description: An individual receiving or providing mental health care, including clients/patients and clinicians/therapists.

properties.name: role
properties.description: Role of the person (e.g., client, therapist, family member)

properties.name: age
properties.description: Age of the person

properties.name: gender
properties.description: Gender identity

properties.name: cultural_background
properties.description: Cultural, religious, or ethnic background

properties.name: comorbidities
properties.description: Other mental or physical health conditions

node_types.description: A traumatic event experienced by a person, relevant to PTSD onset and treatment.

properties.name: event_type
properties.description: Type of trauma (e.g., war, abuse, disaster)

properties.name: date
properties.description: Date or time period of the trauma

properties.name: description
properties.description: Narrative or summary of the trauma event

node_types.description: A clinical diagnosis of posttraumatic stress disorder, including symptom profile and severity.

properties.name: diagnosis_date
properties.description: Date of diagnosis

properties.name: symptom_severity
properties.description: Severity of PTSD symptoms

properties.name: comorbid_conditions
properties.description: Other co-occurring diagnoses

properties.name: assessment_tools
properties.description: Assessment instruments used (e.g., SUDS)

node_types.description: A cognitive-behavioral therapy treatment protocol or package for PTSD.

properties.name: treatment_name
properties.description: Name of the CBT protocol (e.g., PE, CPT, SIT, STAIR, CBCT)

properties.name: focus
properties.description: Treatment focus (e.g., trauma-focused, skills-focused)

properties.name: session_count
properties.description: Number of sessions in the protocol

properties.name: delivery_format
properties.description: Format (e.g., individual, group, telehealth, virtual reality)

properties.name: empirical_support
properties.description: Summary of empirical evidence for efficacy

node_types.description: A specific therapeutic technique or component used within CBT for PTSD.

properties.name: technique_name
properties.description: Name of the technique (e.g., imaginal exposure, Socratic dialogue, cognitive worksheet)

properties.name: modality
properties.description: Type of intervention (e.g., behavioral, cognitive, skills-based)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of the technique

properties.name: target_symptoms
properties.description: Symptoms or deficits targeted by the technique

node_types.description: A psychological or behavioral symptom relevant to PTSD or comorbid conditions.

properties.name: symptom_type
properties.description: Type of symptom (e.g., avoidance, hyperarousal, negative beliefs, dissociation)

properties.name: severity
properties.description: Severity or frequency of the symptom

properties.name: onset
properties.description: When the symptom began

node_types.description: A belief, schema, or appraisal related to trauma, self, others, or the world.

properties.name: appraisal_type
properties.description: Type of appraisal (e.g., maladaptive, adaptive, overaccommodation, assimilation)

properties.name: content
properties.description: Content of the belief or schema

properties.name: influencing_factors
properties.description: Cultural, religious, or identity factors influencing the appraisal

node_types.description: A deficit in emotion regulation, interpersonal functioning, or coping skills relevant to PTSD.

properties.name: deficit_type
properties.description: Type of skill deficit (e.g., emotion regulation, distress tolerance, interpersonal skills)

properties.name: severity
properties.description: Severity or impact of the deficit

node_types.description: The result or effect of a treatment intervention, including symptom change and functional improvement.

properties.name: outcome_type
properties.description: Type of outcome (e.g., symptom reduction, improved functioning, relapse prevention)

properties.name: measurement_tool
properties.description: Tool or scale used to measure outcome

properties.name: timepoint
properties.description: When the outcome was measured (e.g., post-treatment, follow-up)

node_types.description: A cultural, religious, or identity-related factor relevant to trauma appraisal or treatment planning.

properties.name: factor_type
properties.description: Type of factor (e.g., religious belief, cultural norm, gender identity)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of the factor and its relevance

node_types.description: A reference, manual, or external resource relevant to PTSD treatment.

properties.name: resource_type
properties.description: Type of resource (e.g., manual, website, book)

properties.name: title
properties.description: Title or name of the resource

properties.name: url
properties.description: Web link if available

edge_types.description: Indicates that a person has experienced a specific traumatic event.
Links a person to their PTSD diagnosis.
Associates a PTSD diagnosis with specific symptoms.
Indicates that a person has received a specific CBT treatment protocol.

properties.name: start_date
properties.description: Date treatment began

properties.name: end_date
properties.description: Date treatment ended

properties.name: treatment_setting
properties.description: Setting (e.g., outpatient, telehealth, group)

edge_types.description: Indicates that a CBT treatment protocol includes a specific therapeutic technique.
Indicates that a technique is intended to address a specific symptom.
Indicates that a technique targets a specific cognitive appraisal or schema.
Indicates that a technique is used to build or remediate a specific skill deficit.
Links a treatment protocol to its observed outcomes.
Indicates that a person has a relevant cultural, religious, or identity-related factor influencing treatment.
Indicates that a cognitive appraisal is influenced by a specific cultural or religious factor.
Indicates that a treatment protocol is described or referenced in a specific resource.
